title: RNA isolation from paraffinated material of histological´s prepared slides
author: Matheus Moreira Perez
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The parafinization of solid biopsies allows a better preservation and preparation of microscopy slides used for histological evaluations. Techniques of RNA extraction are suitable to be applied in microtomized paraffinated material, but the extraction of paraffinic material already disposed in a slide has not yet been described and can be useful for gene expression studies. We adapted the RNA isolation technique of paraffinated material for slide-laid paraffinited material, using the Rneasy® FFPE Kit. Total RNA so isolated is suitable to gene expression analysis by RT-qPCR.
steps_raw: The parafinization of solid biopsies allows a better preservation and preparation of microscopy slides used for histological evaluations. We adapted the RNA isolation technique of paraffinated material for slide-laid paraffinited material, using the Rneasy® FFPE Kit. Total RNA so isolated is suitable to gene expression analysis by RT-qPCR.
